_provenance.note: FRESH FROZEN synthetic constructional items, authored for this build. internal-contrast-only: these are author-constructed minimal sets, NOT human-annotated; NO human-comparison claim is licensed (Q4). Each ambiguous item is paired with two clear-class controls (one forcing each single reading) so the C3 clear-class precondition has mass on BOTH poles. The two competing readings are encoded as paraphrase (1)/(2); ambiguity types span PP-attachment, coordination scope, and quantifier/argument-structure scope. Frozen here; the sha256 of instrument.json + these item files binds them before any run.

_class_legend.ambiguous: BOTH readings (1) and (2) are genuinely available -- the moment-pole test class.
_class_legend.clear-reading1: control: disambiguated so ONLY reading (1) is available.
_class_legend.clear-reading2: control: disambiguated so ONLY reading (2) is available.
